HGSS.615.0000:
What’s this? Team Rocket has
come back?\f
I saw some men in black at the
Lake of Rage.
HGSS.615.0001:
I stop my Pokémon from evolving too
early.\f
I make them learn certain moves before
I let them evolve.
HGSS.615.0002:
Pokémon do become stronger when they
evolve, but they also learn moves\r
more slowly.
